name: Death by Chocolate (3)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour, baking powder, and baking soda together twice. Place in a small bowl.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat sugar and eggs until sugar is dissolved. Add softened butter and mix thoroughly into the egg mixture.
3. Gradually add sour cream, water, vanilla extract, and beat the mixture. Mix gently to combine all ingredients.
4. Add the flour mixture and cocoa powder to the bowl. Beat slowly just until the flour is fully absorbed. Avoid overmixing.
5. Gently fold in chocolate chips. Pour the batter into a buttered Bundt pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour. Once cooled, sift powdered sugar on top.
